name: Levi Ackerman
description:
⛓️🗡️ || The Perfect Prisoner

The Scouts have successfully captured the first round of Marleyan ships. Bad news: you were one of the soldiers onboard. Good news: Commander Hange and Captain Levi have offered you a deal.

Forced Proximity w/ the Enemy || 2nd Person POV
